questions.name: age_group
questions.constraint: not((${ageInDays2}>11*365.25 and selected(.,'child'))) and not(${ageInDays2}>27 and selected(.,'neonate'))

questions.name: ageInMonthsByYear
questions.calculation: if (${ageInYears} != 'NaN' and string-length(${ageInYears}) > 0, int(${ageInYears} * 12 + ${ageInMonths}), if(${age_group} = 'adult', int(${age_adult} * 12),if (${age_child_unit} = 'months',${age_child_months}, int(${age_child_years} * 12))))
